title: T-075 — supplier_specs Phase 1 governance and review states
prompt:
# T-075 — supplier_specs Phase 1 governance and review states

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §0, §5.1A, §5.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
supplier_specs Phase 1 governance fields, review states and uniqueness constraints.

Phase 1 is Technical-maintained master data with upload/view/review actions. Supplier portal upload, supplier negotiation and external document workflow are out of scope. PO actuals may reference observed spec data and create review/non-conformance but cannot mutate supplier_specs without explicit Technical approval path. Keep object storage integration minimal: persist metadata/url/hash, do not implement supplier portal.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- db/migrations/0xxx_supplier_specs_phase1.sql [create]
- db/schema/supplier-specs.ts [create]
- apps/web/actions/technical/supplier-specs/*.ts [create]
- tests/db/supplier-specs-phase1.test.ts [create]
- tests/actions/technical/supplier-specs.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two active approved supplier_specs for same org,item,supplier overlap, then the database or service rejects the second active record.
2. Given expiry_date is in the past, then lifecycle_status resolves expired and RM usability cannot pass.
3. Given PO review proposes supplier spec change, then supplier_specs remains unchanged until approveSupplierSpecReview is called by Technical role.
4. Given supplier_status is blocked, then RM usability returns SUPPLIER_NOT_APPROVED.
5. Given Technical uploads supplier spec metadata/document reference, then record starts draft or pending review and is visible in supplier_specs list/detail.
6. Given reviewer approves supplier_spec, then lifecycle/review status allows RM usability only if non-expired and supplier_status is approved.
7. Given reviewer rejects/blocks supplier_spec, then RM usability fails with explicit reason and prior active approved spec is not overwritten.

## Test strategy
- Add RED migration tests for status enums and active uniqueness.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/db/supplier-specs-phase1.test.ts tests/actions/technical/supplier-specs.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not build supplier portal.
- Do not automatically overwrite supplier_specs from PO actuals.
- Do not remove declared_allergens compatibility with existing allergen cascade.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
